# Accessor: font

## Get Signature

```ts
get font(): 
  | TextmodeFont
  | TextmodeTileset;
```

Font or tileset used by the current drawing layer.

### Returns

  \| [`TextmodeFont`](../../../namespaces/fonts/classes/TextmodeFont.md)
  \| [`TextmodeTileset`](../../../namespaces/fonts/classes/TextmodeTileset.md)
